'''âw-h-t''' ('''kawahat''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:monolog|monolog]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-h-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:monolog|monolog]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-h-t
|-
! Lemma
| kawahat
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwahat|thiwahat]] || [[word:jiwahat|jiwahat]] || [[word:shiwahat|shiwahat]] || [[word:kiwahat|kiwahat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwahat|thuthuwahat]] || [[word:jujuwahat|jujuwahat]] || [[word:shushuwahat|shushuwahat]] || [[word:kukuwahat|kukuwahat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuwahat|thuwahat]] || [[word:juwahat|juwahat]] || [[word:shuwahat|shuwahat]] || [[word:kuwahat|kuwahat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuwahat|thuwahat]] || [[word:juwahat|juwahat]] || [[word:shuwahat|shuwahat]] || [[word:kuwahat|kuwahat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thewahat|thewahat]] || [[word:jewahat|jewahat]] || [[word:shewahat|shewahat]] || [[word:kewahat|kewahat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothowahat|thothowahat]] || [[word:jojowahat|jojowahat]] || [[word:shoshowahat|shoshowahat]] || [[word:kokowahat|kokowahat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowahat|thowahat]] || [[word:jowahat|jowahat]] || [[word:showahat|showahat]] || [[word:kowahat|kowahat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowahat|thowahat]] || [[word:jowahat|jowahat]] || [[word:showahat|showahat]] || [[word:kowahat|kowahat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠwahat|thĂŠwahat]] || [[word:jĂŠwahat|jĂŠwahat]] || [[word:shĂŠwahat|shĂŠwahat]] || [[word:kĂŠwahat|kĂŠwahat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathawahat|thathawahat]] || [[word:jajawahat|jajawahat]] || [[word:shashawahat|shashawahat]] || [[word:kakawahat|kakawahat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thawahat|thawahat]] || [[word:jawahat|jawahat]] || [[word:shawahat|shawahat]] || [[word:kawahat|kawahat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawahat|thawahat]] || [[word:jawahat|jawahat]] || [[word:shawahat|shawahat]] || [[word:kawahat|kawahat]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shawahat|shawahat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshawahat|goshawahat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishawahat|gokishawahat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shawahatnĂŒ|shawahatnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshawahatnknĂŒ|goshawahatnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishawahatnĂŒ|gokishawahatnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shawahatshĂ«|shawahatshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshawahatnkshĂ«|goshawahatnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishawahatshĂ«|gokishawahatshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawahatro|shawahatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawahatnkro|goshawahatnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawahatro|gokishawahatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shawahatmu|shawahatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawahatnkmu|goshawahatnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawahatmu|gokishawahatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shawahatsher|shawahatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshawahatnksher|goshawahatnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishawahatsher|gokishawahatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shawahatng|shawahatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshawahatnkng|goshawahatnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishawahatng|gokishawahatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shawahatya|shawahatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshawahatnkya|goshawahatnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishawahatya|gokishawahatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shawahatyam|shawahatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshawahatnkyam|goshawahatnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishawahatyam|gokishawahatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawahatnĂŒshĂ«|shawahatnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawahatnknĂŒshĂ«|goshawahatnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawahatnĂŒshĂ«|gokishawahatnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawahatnĂŒro|shawahatnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawahatnknĂŒro|goshawahatnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawahatnĂŒro|gokishawahatnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawahatnĂŒmu|shawahatnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawahatnknĂŒmu|goshawahatnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawahatnĂŒmu|gokishawahatnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawahatshĂ«nĂŒ|shawahatshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawahatnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshawahatnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawahatshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishawahatshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawahatshĂ«ro|shawahatshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawahatnkshĂ«ro|goshawahatnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawahatshĂ«ro|gokishawahatshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawahatshĂ«mu|shawahatshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawahatnkshĂ«mu|goshawahatnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawahatshĂ«mu|gokishawahatshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawahatronĂŒ|shawahatronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawahatnkronĂŒ|goshawahatnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawahatronĂŒ|gokishawahatronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawahatroshĂ«|shawahatroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawahatnkroshĂ«|goshawahatnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawahatroshĂ«|gokishawahatroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawahatromu|shawahatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawahatnkromu|goshawahatnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawahatromu|gokishawahatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawahatmunĂŒ|shawahatmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawahatnkmunĂŒ|goshawahatnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawahatmunĂŒ|gokishawahatmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawahatmushĂ«|shawahatmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawahatnkmushĂ«|goshawahatnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawahatmushĂ«|gokishawahatmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawahatmuro|shawahatmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawahatnkmuro|goshawahatnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawahatmuro|gokishawahatmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki active verbs]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
